ReviewFocus.Focus: Verify 1 callers of AuthService.verifyToken pass correct params after signature change (return type change: boolean → Promise<boolean>)

Path.Risk: Caller verifyToken returns true for non-empty may assume old return type: boolean

ChangedFunction.name: AuthService.verifyToken
ChangedFunction.WhatChanged: Parameters changed: (token: string) → (token: string, opts: VerifyOpts). Return type changed: boolean → Promise<boolean>. Function body modified. 1 callers may need param update; 1 callers may assume old return type

RiskSignals.Signal: Parameters changed: (token: string) → (token: string, opts: VerifyOpts)
